  "text": "func TestSessionConnectionCleanupJobNewJobErr(t *testing.T) {
n1: 	t.Parallel()
n2: 	ctx := context.TODO()
n3: 	const op = "controller.newNewSessionConnectionCleanupJob"
n4: 	require := require.New(t)

n5: 	job, err := newSessionConnectionCleanupJob(nil, 0)
n6: 	require.Equal(err, errors.E(
		ctx,
		errors.WithCode(errors.InvalidParameter),
		errors.WithOp(op),
		errors.WithMsg("missing connectionRepoFn"),
	))
n7: 	require.Nil(job)

n8: 	job, err = newSessionConnectionCleanupJob(func() (*session.ConnectionRepository, error) { return nil, nil }, 0)
n9: 	require.Equal(err, errors.E(
		ctx,
		errors.WithCode(errors.InvalidParameter),
		errors.WithOp(op),
		errors.WithMsg(fmt.Sprintf("invalid gracePeriod, must be greater than %s", session.DeadWorkerConnCloseMinGrace)),
	))
n10: 	require.Nil(job)
}
"
}

  "text": "// Scheduler is used to register and run recurring jobs on the controller.
type Scheduler struct {
	serverId  string
	jobRepoFn jobRepoFactory

	registeredJobs *sync.Map
	runningJobs    *sync.Map
	started        ua.Bool

	runJobsLimit       uint
	runJobsInterval    time.Duration
	monitorInterval    time.Duration
	interruptThreshold time.Duration
	runNow             chan struct{}
}"
}

  "view": {
    "generation": 2,
    "nodes": 0,
    "text": "// sessionConnectionCleanupJob defines a periodic job that monitors workers for\n// loss of connection and terminates connections on workers that have\n// not sent a heartbeat in a significant period of time.\n//\n// Relevant connections are simply marked as disconnected in the\n// database. Connections will be independently terminated by the\n// worker, or the event of a synchronization issue between the two,\n// the controller will win out and order that the connections be\n// closed on the worker.\ntype SessionConnectionCleanupJob struct {\n\tconnectionRepoFn common.ConnectionRepoFactory\n\n\t// The amount of time to give disconnected workers before marking\n\t// their connections as closed.\n\tgracePeriod time.Duration\n\n\t// The total number of connections closed in the last run.\n\ttotalClosed int\n}"
  }
}

    "text": "func NewSessionConnectionCleanupJob(\n\tconnectionRepoFn common.ConnectionRepoFactory,\n\tgracePeriod time.Duration,\n) (*SessionConnectionCleanupJob, error) {\nn1: \tconst op = \"controller.newNewSessionConnectionCleanupJob\"\nn2: \tswitch {\nn3: \tcase connectionRepoFn == nil:\nn4: \t\treturn nil, errors.NewDeprecated(errors.InvalidParameter, op, \"missing connectionRepoFn\")\nn5: \tcase gracePeriod \u003c session.DeadWorkerConnCloseMinGrace:\nn6: \t\treturn nil, errors.NewDeprecated(\n\t\t\terrors.InvalidParameter, op, fmt.Sprintf(\"invalid gracePeriod, must be greater than %s\", session.DeadWorkerConnCloseMinGrace))\n\t}\n\nn7: \treturn \u0026SessionConnectionCleanupJob{\n\t\tconnectionRepoFn: connectionRepoFn,\n\t\tgracePeriod:      gracePeriod,\n\t}, nil\n}\n"
  }
}
